def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; import ta
    short_ema = ta.trend.ema_indicator(df['close'], window=params['short_ema'])
    long_ema = ta.trend.ema_indicator(df['close'], window=params['long_ema'])
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=params['rsi_period'])
    signals = np.where((short_ema > long_ema) & (rsi < params['rsi_lower']), 1, np.where((short_ema < long_ema) & (rsi > params['rsi_upper']), -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: GBP/JPY exhibits mean reversion tendencies when short-term EMA crosses long-term EMA combined with RSI indicating overbought/oversold conditions.
